text.title: one-command-dev-env-template Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions. Minimum-form decision tree for a flat decision-record methodology.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ALL preconditions satisfied? (recent task context present AND named owner identifiable AND artefact store writable)

branch.question: Does an existing working artefact already cover this gap?

branch.conclusion: Skip: do not duplicate. Update the existing artefact instead; methodology output goes to the existing record's notes field.
Run the checklist. Emit a new decision-record per the output contract.
Skip this methodology. Surface the missing precondition (no owner? no recent context? no write access?). Defer until the gap is closed.

text.example: inputs: {owner=ruslan@faion.net, recent_context=ticket-1234, store=docs/decisions/, duplicate=false} q-preconditions -> true q-duplicate -> false => conclusion r2-typed-input: emit decision-record.
